com: Formal offer by means of scheme of arrangement announced at 590p per share plus 22 pence dividend. 99.9% of votes were in favour at meetings on 16 April 2026.
Scheme of arrangement made at same terms as indicative proposal. Vote on 22 April 2026. Expected to become effective during H2 2026.
Indicative proposal made by private equity firm EQT at £54 per share. Board considering its response after rejecting £51.50 per share.
Shareholders have overwhelmingly approved the scheme, but still subject to regulatory approval. Completion expected some time in Q3.

Formal offer announced on 7 April 2026 by Tinicum and Blackstone at 297.85p in cash. Indicative offer of 270p from Advent was rejected. Advent withdrew on 8 April 2026. Arcline Investment Management had made an approach before withdrawing on 1 April 2026.
Competing approaches received from Bridgepoint and Triton, following a strategic review.  Discussions with Bridgepoint and Triton have now ended. Discussions ongoing with other parties.
In preliminary discussions with a number of interested counterparties. Potential offerors not required to be identified.
Strategic review after meetings with financial investors who wanted to maximise value. No approaches mentioned.
Indicative all share offer by Acceler8 Ventures plc, valued at £600m. Offer subject to due diligence. Board "minded to recommend" and undertakings in respect of 24.59%. We expect a formal offer here.
Shareholders approved scheme on 11 March. Still subject to regulatory approval, with parties aiming to complete by end of Q2 2026.
In discussions with TA Associates (UK), LLP regarding a possible offer, no price given.
Strategic review ongoing - NCC has not stated it has received an approach.
Strategic review and formal sales process. No approaches mentioned.

b: LONDONMETRIC PROPERTY & SCHRODER REAL ESTATE INVESTMENT TRUST
com: Strategic review and formal sales process. On 11 Feb 2026, in response to media speculation interest from LondonMetric Property PLC confirmed. No PUSU deadline. Company currently making a shortlist of bidders.

b: HELIOS INVESTMENT PARTNERS LLP / STONEX GROUP INC
com: Helios consortium (which already owns 45.11%) has gone hostile, with 85p formal offer. On 16 April StoneX increased its indicative offer to 110p, which is conditional on Helios Consortium giving undertakings. Board "minded to recommend" StoneX proposal. On 17 April 2026, the Helios Consortium states it will not provide an irrevocable undertaking to StoneX's proposal.
Formal £235.2m offer by Charterhouse Capital, 41.7% undertakings. Scheme of arrangement in cash with a rollover alternative. Completion Q2 or Q3 2026
Atlas Holdings LLC makes indicative offer at 65p for the building materials distributor. Board has stated it fundamentally undervalues company. Talks ongoing.
Offer, by scheme of arrangement, from Qatar-based bank, expected to complete Q3. Undertakings of 19.5%. Offer follows strategic review addressing "persistent discount to its realisable asset value".

Multiple unsolicited proposals from Saudi Arabia's Alamadiyaf al-Masiyyah, which has due diligence access. No price given. Discussions were ongoing and the board was seeking clarity around Alamadiyaf al-Masiyyah's funding arrangements.  On 24 March 2026, Capricorn rejected proposal from Dragon Oil to acquire its assets in the Western Desert.
Scheme of arrangement, approved by over 94% of shareholders on 15 April 2026. Completion expected Q2, subject to FCA approval.

Strategic review. Company has engaged with a limited number of counterparties. No PUSU and potential offerors are not required to be named. Review taking place alongside consideration of alternative strategic options to finance growth.
Strategic review, has received approaches from two parties.
Strategic review & formal sale process. Has not received an indicative offer but has held preliminary discussions with a small number of counterparties.

Strategic review, with a variety of strategic options being considered.  On 16 April 2026, Audioboom disclosed discussions with a small number of parties who are considering making a cash offer.  The indicative pricing of preliminary proposals received to date were at a premium to the closing price on 2 October 2025. Strategic review expected to conclude Q2 2026.
Expected to complete on 29 April 2026 - all regulatory and shareholder approvals received.

Discussions part of a strategic review. IQE was in receipt of an approach from a potential offeror, although there could be no certainty either that an offer would be made nor as to the terms of any offer.
Approved by target shareholders. Completion still subject to FCA approvals, with long stop date of 29 May 2026.
Recommended cash offer, by means of a scheme of arrangement - 28.7% undertakings.
At “minded to recommend” stage. We expect a formal offer.
Formal sale process inviting expressions of interest. Not in discussions with any potential bidder and no price.
Discussions are with selected third parties as part of a private strategic review process.
17p offer is less than 20p proposal, but strong undertakings in respect of 57%. Unconditional date 28 May 2026.
